ocr_findings.description: Illustration at top captured as image placeholder — expected for non-text diagram content

reviewer_notes: Lesson 09-04 データ構造 intro page covering スタックとキュー section start. OCR captures the page number (317), the パンくずで家に帰れる callout, the メモリ explanation, and the データ構造 definition accurately. Page ends mid-sentence ('積み上げられた本の') which is correct page-boundary behaviour.
